title: Job Description Generator for a Creative Role
scenario: Generate a job description for a creative role in a marketing agency. The job description must be engaging, informative, and authentic to the provided creative persona. Use the persona's voice and style to guide the content and tone.
constraints: Must include a list of desired skills and qualifications
Must use the provided persona's preferred job title and department

evaluationCriteria.description: Does the response adhere to the provided persona's tone, language, and style?
Does the response encourage engagement and interest in the role?
Does the response convey authenticity and credibility towards the creative role?
Does the response include a list of desired skills and qualifications?
